name: Deboning a Chicken
recipeIngredient: Using a 3 to 3 1/4 pound roasting chicken
Neck skin (lift up to expose flesh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wings at the second joint and set aside.
2. Lift neck skin, exposing flesh; follow contour of wishbone with knife to loosen it.
3. Pull the wishbone out.
4. Place chicken on its breast; cut down the backbone to expose meat.
5. Follow carcass with knife, cutting meat from bone along the entire length. Cut at shoulder joint, top and around breastbone, and opposite side. Separate meat from bone as you go without worrying about leg, shoulder, or wing bones.
6. Remove carcass in one piece.
7. Cut around thigh bone to free it; scrape with knife to push meat off bone. Separate thighbone from drumstick joint; leave drumstick bone intact.
8. With large knife, cut tip of drumstick and push flesh back to expose bone.
9. Cut tip of wing bones.
10. Two fillets will be loose on the breast; pull them down where skin has no meat covering. Most surface should be covered with meat.
